hero.headline: Discover the World with Voratravel
hero.subheadline: From the magic of Costa Rica to the treasures of Europe, we create unique and unforgettable experiences for every traveler.

home.featuredToursDesc: Carefully designed experiences for the most discerning travelers
home.destinationsDesc: Explore unique destinations, from Costa Rica's tropical beaches to Europe's historic cities
home.feature1Desc: Over 15 years connecting travelers with extraordinary destinations in Costa Rica and worldwide
home.feature2Desc: Every itinerary is tailored to meet your preferences and needs
home.feature3Desc: Exclusive selection of destinations in Costa Rica, Europe, Central America and more
home.feature4Desc: We operate with the highest standards of safety and transparency
home.ctaSectionDesc: Contact us and let's design your dream trip together

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.subtitle: Discover unique experiences designed for every type of traveler

insurance.title: Travel Insurance
insurance.subtitle: Travel with complete peace of mind. Protect your investment and health anywhere in the world.

about.title: About Voratravel
about.subtitle: Connecting dreams with destinations from Costa Rica to the world
about.storyText: Voratravel was born from a love for Costa Rica and a passion for showing the world the wonders of our land, as well as taking Costa Ricans to explore the most fascinating corners of the planet. We are a travel agency with Costa Rican roots and a global vision.
about.missionText: To create unforgettable, authentic, and safe travel experiences that connect people with the beauty of the world, promoting sustainable tourism to and from Costa Rica.
about.visionText: To be the reference travel agency in Costa Rica, recognized for excellence, innovation, and commitment to every traveler.
